title: Find duplicate characters in a string
explanation:
## Problem
Given a string, find all characters that appear more than once.

## Approach
Use a `Map<string, number>` to build a frequency table in O(n), then filter entries where count > 1.

## Complexity
- Time: O(n)
- Space: O(k) where k = unique character count

codeBlocks.caption: Frequency map approach — O(n)
